update:
The  filter  query parameter for  resourceRecordSets.list  is generally available ( GA ). 
 You can filter records to match a specified domain using the API.

Monitoring your internet-bound DNS queries for malicious activity using DNS Armor is generally available ( GA ). 
 For more information, see  Advanced threat detection with DNS Armor .

Alias records  are available in  GA . 
 This custom record type provides CNAME-like functionality at the zone apex, mapping the apex domain name to a canonical target.

Monitoring your internet-bound DNS queries for malicious activity using advanced threat detection from DNS Armor is now available in  Preview . 
 For more information, see  Advanced threat detection overview .

DNS64 is available in  GA .  
 DNS64 provides synthesized IPv6 addresses for IPv4 destinations. For more information, see the following: 
 
 DNS64 overview 
 Configure DNS64 server policies
Using a fully qualified domain name (FQDN)  forwarding target  is available for outbound DNS forwarding in  GA .
Using a fully qualified domain name (FQDN)  forwarding target  is available for outbound DNS forwarding in  Preview .
Health checks for external endpoints  in Cloud DNS routing policies are now available in  GA .
DNS64  is now available in  Preview .
You can now select internal proxy Network Load Balancers as a health checked target for DNS routing policies in  Preview . For more information, see  DNS routing policies and health checks .
Health checks for external endpoints  in Cloud DNS routing policies are now available in  Preview .
You can now select a cross-region internal Application Load Balancer as a health checked target for DNS routing policies. For more information, see  Manage DNS routing policies and health checks .
You can now select internal Application Load Balancers as a health checked target for DNS routing policies. For more information, see  Manage DNS routing policies and health checks .
Health checks for internal load balancers and automatic failovers  in Cloud DNS routing policies are now available in  GA .
Configuring  Cloud DNS scopes  is now available in  GA .

Zonal Cloud DNS zones  are now available in  GA . 
 You can create private DNS zones that are scoped only to a Google Cloud zone.
Cloud DNS per resource IAM permissions  are available in  GA .
Health checks for internal load balancers and automatic failovers  in Cloud DNS routing policies are now available in  Preview .

Alias records  are available in  Preview . 
 You can now manage an alias record, which maps an alias domain name to a canonical name at the zone apex, by using Cloud DNS.

Cloud DNS per resource IAM permissions  are available in  Preview . 
 You can now set up specific read, write, or administrator permissions for different managed
zones under the same project.

Zonal Cloud DNS zones  are now available in  Preview . 
 You can create private DNS zones that are scoped only to a Google Cloud zone.
This release fixes an issue in which  Audit Logs  for  PATCH  operations on managed zones and DNS server policies were not being generated.
Managing routing policies  in Cloud DNS is available in  GA .
The type of the  vmInstanceId  field in Cloud DNS's Stackdriver Logs has been changed from a number to a string.
Cloud Logging  for managed public zones in Cloud DNS is now available in  GA .
Managing response policies and rules  in Cloud DNS is available in  GA .
Managing routing policies  in Cloud DNS is available in  preview .
Cloud DNS monitoring dashboard  is available in  GA .
Configuring  Cloud DNS scopes  is now available in  Preview .
The  API for updating  ResourceRecordSets  in Cloud DNS  is now available in  GA .
Managing response policies and rules  in Cloud DNS is available in  Preview .
The  API for updating  ResourceRecordSets  in Cloud DNS  is now available in  Beta .
DNS forwarding to a non-RFC 1918 address  is available in  General Availability .
Cloud DNS peering  is available in  General Availability .
DNS forwarding to a non-RFC 1918 address  is available in  Beta .
Private DNS User Facing Query Logging and Monitoring  is available in  General Availability .
DNS Forwarding  is available in  General Availability .
DNS peering  is available in  Beta .
Private DNS logging and monitoring  is available in  Beta .
Private zones support  is available in  General Availability .
Shared VPC  service projects now support  Cloud DNS private zones  by default.
DNS forwarding  is available in  Beta .
Private zones support  is available in  Beta .
DNSSEC for Cloud DNS  is available in  General Availability .
DNSSEC for Cloud DNS  is available in  Beta .
Private zones for Cloud DNS is available in  Alpha .
DNSSEC for Cloud DNS  is available in  Beta .
Cloud DNS  is available in  General Availability .
